name: /pr-source-remove rejects an unknown source id with a hint suggesting list-sources
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'sources: []\noperator_namespace: []\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-source-remove.sh" no-such-id --registry .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'unknown_source_id' err.txt && grep -q 'pr-source-list' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
